nasb.text: Who shows no partiality to princes Nor regards the rich above the poor, For they all are the work of His hands?

esv.text: who shows no partiality to princes, nor regards the rich more than the poor, for they are all the work of his hands?

cnv.text: 他不徇王子的情面， 也不看重富人過於窮人， 因為他們都是他手所造的。

ccb.text: 祂不偏袒王侯， 也不轻贫重富， 因为他们都是祂亲手造的。
